$comment: GENERATED by contracts/codegen/generate.py from task_station_assignment.schema.yaml - DO NOT EDIT.
description: An append-only, time-ranged (site_id, station_id)→task assignment; resolved as-of at ingest — the dynamic stations.yaml.

assigned_by.description: The supervisor/person who set the assignment (provenance).

assignment_id.description: The assignment record's own id (the anchor; append-only idempotency, like operational-event.event_id).

created_at.description: When this assignment row was appended (distinct from effective_from, which is when it takes effect).

effective_from.description: Start of this assignment's validity — HARD (the record's essence; resolution anchor). Diverges from kit/task nullable.

effective_to.description: End of validity; null = the open/current assignment. A mid-day change closes this and appends a new row.

rotation_id.description: The assigned rotation/prompt variant (a task carries one-or-more variants selected by rotation_id).

site_id.description: Site scope (on the card, provenance.site_id) — part of the resolution key; a bare station_id collides across sites.

station_id.description: The assigned station (on the card, identity.station_id) — part of the (site_id, station_id, timestamp) resolution key.

task_version.description: The assigned task version (the catalog is versioned; pinned onto the episode at ingest, B/OQ-6).

title: TaskStationAssignment
